top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasNonFoil = 1 AND c.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards c
WHERE c.id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2.id
    FROM cards c2
    JOIN foreign_data fd ON c2.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.hasNonFoil = 1 AND c.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasNonFoil = 1 AND c.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards c
WHERE c.id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2.id
    FROM cards c2
    JOIN foreign_data fd ON c2.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.hasNonFoil = 1 AND c.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasNonFoil = 1 AND c.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasNonFoil = 1 AND c.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards c
WHERE c.id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2.id
    FROM cards c2
    JOIN foreign_data fd ON c2.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese'
);

WITH cards_with_jp AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.hasFoil, c.hasNonFoil
  FROM cards c
  JOIN foreign_data f ON c.uuid = f.uuid
  WHERE f.language = 'Japanese'
),
only_non_foil AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_only_non_foil
  FROM cards_with_jp
  WHERE hasFoil = 0 AND hasNonFoil = 1
),
total_with_jp AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
  FROM cards_with_jp
)
SELECT 
  CAST(onf.count_only_non_foil AS REAL) * 100 / tj.total_count AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM only_non_foil onf, total_with_jp tj...

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN c.hasNonFoil = 1 AND c.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards c
INNER JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasNonFoil = 1 AND c.hasFoil = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_only_non_foil
FROM cards c
WHERE c.id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT c2.id
    FROM cards c2
    JOIN foreign_data fd ON c2.uuid = fd.uuid
    WHERE fd.language = 'Japanese'
);
